query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white nighttime scene showing a street intersection with a crosswalk in the foreground. A person wearing a dark hat and coat stands near a lamppost with horizontal reflective bands on the left side of the frame. Buildings with illuminated windows and a lit storefront or interior space are visible in the background. A traffic signal or overhead structure spans across the upper portion of the image.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred black-and-white nighttime street scene with a ghostly figure in a dark hat and coat standing near a reflective lamppost, the surroundings streaked horizontally into abstract smears of light and shadow. The image is rendered in crushed, near-monochrome tones with flat, depthless lighting that collapses detail into murky gradients, creating a dreamlike, unstable impression of urban night.
